contents: 当尖锐眼光 当刺耳声响，记得 ‘Prayers for bobby’ 里有这么一句台词： ‘Please don't give up hope on life, or yourselves. You're very special to me, and I'm working very hard to make this life a better and safer place for you to live in. Promise me you'll keep trying. Bobby gave up on love, I hope you won't. You're always in my thoughts.’
